title: External connections: local LoRA/upscale drag-drop + missing guard
description: Phase 1 (local drag-drop into configured folders + local missing guard) SHIPPED + accepted. RE-SCOPED 2026-06-17: Phase 2/3 is now ON-DEMAND auto-upload, mirroring the existing latent/media upload — NOT manual drop-to-Pod. Local stays the single source of truth; at generate-time in remote mode, a selected LoRA/upscale that's local-but-not-on-Pod auto-uploads (toast 'Uploading <model> to cloud…'), then generation proceeds. Skip re-upload via /wrapper/models/status (works as-is). Phase 2A app-side builds NOW; Phase 2B = new /wrapper/models/upload endpoint, gated on MPI-81 Pod-image rebuild. See plan.md RE-SCOPE block.

attention.reason: RE-SCOPED 2026-06-17 (user) — dropped the old 'drop-zones-upload-to-Pod / remote-presence-picker' framing. New plan = on-demand auto-upload at generate-time (copies the latent/media pattern). The 'remote validation checkbox' never existed in code (confirmed) — nothing to remove. App-side Phase 2A (remote-aware guard + upload plumbing + presence via existing /wrapper/models/status) can build + test NOW; only the actual upload POST is gated on MPI-81 (new /wrapper/models/upload endpoint = Pod-image rebuild, separable to its own agent). NOTE TO CONCURRENT AGENTS: MPI-82 Phase 2A will touch routes/remoteModels.js, routes/remoteProxy.js, routes/comfy.js, js/services/comfyController.js, js/services/commandExecutor.js — coordinate before editing these.
